description: Typed workflow interfaces, edge composition, explicit adapters, guards, joins, state isolation, merge policies, and bounded loops/backtracking.

userStories.title: Implement text and JSON workflow ports
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I want explicit text and JSON ports so that workflow contracts are validated.
acceptanceCriteria: WorkflowPort supports kind text and kind json with schema and optional description
Validate workflow input, node output, adapter output, edge transfer payloads, and workflow output at boundaries
JSON schemas enforce the Structured Outputs/tool-calling subset including object roots, no root anyOf, required object fields, and additionalProperties false on objects
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Validate direct edge compatibility and edge kinds
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I want edges to pass only when source and target contracts are compatible so that composition is safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Edges identify source and target node/port refs
Direct compatible text-to-text and JSON-to-compatible-JSON edges pass validation
Text input to JSON port, invalid JSON output, and incompatible direct edges without adapter fail validation
Edge kinds data, control, error, and resume have tests for payload transfer, recovery routing, and durable resume routing
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement explicit edge adapters and visible adapter nodes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want adapter refs for mismatched interfaces so that transformations are deterministic and testable.
acceptanceCriteria: Incompatible edges can pass only with an explicit registered edgeAdapter or visible adapter node
Adapter output is validated against declared output and target input before downstream execution
Missing adapter refs and adapter output validation failures produce structured diagnostics
sourceOutputAdapter, targetInputAdapter, declarative mapping DSLs, and hidden agent-assisted adapters are not implemented in V1
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add guards and deterministic outgoing edge selection
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I want guarded routing so that data can move along declared branches without ambiguous execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Edges may include guard or condition refs resolved through the Workflow Registry
Multiple matching outgoing guarded edges require explicit priority/order or fail validation
Guard results that affect durable routing are persisted or diagnosed when runtime-only
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement fan-in join policies
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I want explicit join policies so that fan-in behavior is predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: Join policies include all_success, one_success, none_failed_min_one_success, and all_done
Default ambiguous fan-in is all_success
Join decisions are computed from persisted upstream attempt statuses including skipped nodes according to policy
Join decisions emit workflow events or structured diagnostics when they affect routing
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Enforce global/local/edge state isolation
userStories.description: As an operator, I want state and edge payloads to be inspectable and isolated so that one node cannot read another node local state accidentally.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime treats edge payloads as immutable transfer records
Local node state is invisible to other nodes unless explicitly mapped to edge payload or global state
State read/write declarations prevent undeclared access or mutation in handlers where statically or runtime detectable
State isolation tests verify node B cannot read node A local state without explicit exposure
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement merge policies and conflict detection
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I want controlled global state writes so that concurrent updates do not corrupt state.
acceptanceCriteria: Merge policies include replace, append, shallowMerge, and custom registered handler
Default merge policy is replace
Concurrent writes to the same global path fail unless a merge policy exists
Custom merge policy handlers must resolve to registered deterministic handlers
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Reject unbounded cycles and support bounded backtracking
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I want review/fix loops so that agent work can iterate without unbounded execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Free cycles and unbounded back-edges fail validation
Guarded back-edges or retry policies with maxAttempts pass validation
Runtime records loop attempt counts and exhaustion diagnostics
Positive and negative tests cover bounded review/fix loop behavior
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
